zh.lifeSummary: 當Diego López III de Haro於1215年出生時，他的父親Lope Cabeza Brava Díaz II de Haro de Vizcaya46歲，母親Urraca Alfonso de León19歲。他於1237年被列為alférez del rey。他去世於1254年10月4日在西班牙拉 利奧亞巴尼奧斯 德 利奧亞享年39歲，埋葬在西班牙拉 利奧亞納拉。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Haro
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Jesus, Juan, Luis, Salvador, Manuel, Carlos, Jorge, Miguel, Alberto, Francisco, Jaime.
Spanish: habitational name from a place in the province of La Rioja, so called from a North Castilian form of Spanish faro ‘beacon’. Compare De Haro .
In some cases possibly also French: metonymic occupational name for a peddler, from an Old French cry used to hail someone or to attract attention.

variants.name: De Haro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Rafael, Arturo, Jaime, Jesus, Ubaldo, Alfredo, Enrique, Felipe, Francisco, Gustavo, Juan.
Spanish: habitational name, formed with the preposition de ‘from’, for someone from a place called Haro (see Haro ).

variants.name: Haros
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico): probably the plural form of Spanish   Haro  .

nameMeanings.name: Diego
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Origin uncertain; perhaps from Santiago or from a native Iberian name found in Latin as Didacus.

nameMeanings.name: López
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Lupus ‘wolf’, probably adopted as a calque of the Germanic name Wolf .

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Diego López III de Haro was born in 1215, his father, Lope Cabeza Brava Díaz II de Haro de Vizcaya, was 46 and his mother, Urraca Alfonso de León, was 19. In 1237, his occupation is listed as alférez del rey. He died on 4 October 1254, in Baños de Rioja, La Rioja, Spain, at the age of 39, and was buried in Nájera, La Rioja, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Diego López III de Haro est né en 1215, son père, Lope Cabeza Brava Díaz II de Haro de Vizcaya, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Urraca Alfonso de León, avait 19 ans. En 1237, sa profession de son indiquée est alférez del rey. Il est décédé le 4 octobre 1254, à Baños de Rioja, La Rioja, Espagne, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Nájera, La Rioja, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Diego López III de Haro 1215 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lope Cabeza Brava Díaz II de Haro de Vizcaya 46 und seine Mutter Urraca Alfonso de León 19. 1237 ist sein Beruf als alférez del rey aufgeführt. Er starb am 4. Oktober 1254 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Baños de Rioja, La Rioja, Spanien und wurde in Nájera, La Rioja, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Diego López III de Haro è nato il nel 1215, il suo padre, Lope Cabeza Brava Díaz II de Haro de Vizcaya, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Urraca Alfonso de León, aveva 19 anni. Nel 1237, la sua occupazione è indicata come alférez del rey. Morì il 4 ottobre 1254, nel Baños de Rioja, La Rioja, Spagna, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Nájera, La Rioja, Spagna.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Diego López III de Haro nasceu em 1215, seu pai, Lope Cabeza Brava Díaz II de Haro de Vizcaya, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Urraca Alfonso de León, tinha 19 anos. Em 1237, sua profissão aparece como alférez del rey. Ele faleceu em 4 de outubro de 1254, em Baños de Rioja, La Rioja, Espanha, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Nájera, La Rioja, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Diego López III de Haro родился в 1215 г., его отцу по имени Lope Cabeza Brava Díaz II de Haro de Vizcaya было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Urraca Alfonso de León, 19. В 1237 году он работал по профессии alférez del rey. Он умер 4 октября 1254 г. в местности баnос де риоджа, ла риоджа, Испания в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности нaджира, ла риоджа, Испания.

En 1237, su ocupación registrada era alférez del rey. Murió el 4 de octubre de 1254, en Baños de Rioja, La Rioja, España, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Nájera, La Rioja, España.
